title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Monet, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Monet, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Coming from a Yuki onna? That stings.

dialogue.speaker: Monet
dialogue.text: Are you fond of Snowball fights?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll be sure to say hi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My... my shoulder!! What's going on!!?

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
